titles.ar: باب النَّطِيحَةِ وَ الْمُتَرَدِّيَةِ وَ مَا أَكَلَ السَّبُعُ تُدْرَكُ ذَكَاتُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 10 – The (animal) butted by the horn, and the one killed by a fall, and what the predators eat, you come to it, slaughter it

titles.ar: باب النَّطِيحَةِ وَ الْمُتَرَدِّيَةِ وَ مَا أَكَلَ السَّبُعُ تُدْرَكُ ذَكَاتُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 10 – The (animal) butted by the horn, and the one killed by a fall, and what the predators eat, you come to it, slaughter it

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ النَّطِيحَةُ وَ الْمُتَرَدِّيَةُ وَ مَا أَكَلَ السَّبُعُ إِذَا أَدْرَكْتَ ذَكَاتَهُ فَكُلْ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ النَّطِيحَةُ وَ الْمُتَرَدِّيَةُ وَ مَا أَكَلَ السَّبُعُ إِذَا أَدْرَكْتَ ذَكَاتَهُ فَكُلْ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa who said,
‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The (animal) butted by the horn, and the one killed by a fall, and what the predators eat, when you come over to it, slaughter it, so eat’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa who said,

‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The (animal) butted by the horn, and the one killed by a fall, and what the predators eat, when you come over to it, slaughter it, so eat’.

segments: 1. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from af-Washsha’ who has said the foiiowing: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ‘If you arrive in time (when it still is alive) to slaughter an animal butted by other animals, fallen from height or eaten by predators, you can use it for food.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from af-Washsha’ who has said the foiiowing: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ‘If you arrive in time (when it still is alive) to slaughter an animal butted by other animals, fallen from height or eaten by predators, you can use it for food.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/18)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/18)

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْوَشَّاءِ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب النَّطِيحَةِ وَ الْمُتَرَدِّيَةِ وَ مَا أَكَلَ السَّبُعُ تُدْرَكُ ذَكَاتُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 10 – The (animal) butted by the horn, and the one killed by a fall, and what the predators eat, you come to it, slaughter it

segments: لَا تَأْكُلْ مِنْ فَرِيسَةِ السَّبُعِ وَ لَا الْمَوْقُوذَةِ وَ لَا الْمُتَرَدِّيَةِ إِلَّا أَنْ تُدْرِكَهَا حَيَّةً فَتُذَكِّيَ .
arabic.text: لَا تَأْكُلْ مِنْ فَرِيسَةِ السَّبُعِ وَ لَا الْمَوْقُوذَةِ وَ لَا الْمُتَرَدِّيَةِ إِلَّا أَنْ تُدْرِكَهَا حَيَّةً فَتُذَكِّيَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not eat from a prey of the predator, nor the one beaten to death, nor the one fallen to death, except if you come to it as alive, so you slaughter it’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not eat from a prey of the predator, nor the one beaten to death, nor the one fallen to death, except if you come to it as alive, so you slaughter it’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Aii ibn ai-Hakam from Ali ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Do not use for food an animal eaten by predator, injured because of fall of something on it or fallen from height, unless you arrive in time (when it is still alive) to slaughter it properly.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Aii ibn ai-Hakam from Ali ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Do not use for food an animal eaten by predator, injured because of fall of something on it or fallen from height, unless you arrive in time (when it is still alive) to slaughter it properly.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/19)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/19)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
